subject: feat(ui): improve app look and feel with transitions, illustrations, and polish
body:
Add 8 UI improvements: CSS page transitions and card entrance animations,
SVG illustrations for empty states, reusable ConfirmDialog replacing
window.confirm(), form list cards with status accent bars and chevrons,
builder header with icon buttons and action group dividers, input focus
shadow animation, high-fidelity loading skeletons, and branded AppHeader.

Tags: ui, ux, polish, components, accessibility
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: ui-polish
Semver: minor
